enhancements.description: Full-frame centered card with a headline and optional supporting line over a dimmed backdrop.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use when introducing a segment, chapter, or the overall topic of the video.

props.name: title
props.description: Primary headline shown on the card.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Secondary line below the title for context or a short tagline.

enhancements.description: Broadcast-style lower third: name and optional role or label anchored toward the bottom of the frame.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use when identifying a speaker, guest, place, or on-screen subject.

props.name: headline
props.description: Main line (for example a person’s name or primary label).

props.name: subline
props.description: Smaller uppercase line such as title, organization, or location.

enhancements.description: Full-width horizontal banner with a main message and optional small label; can be pinned to the top or bottom edge.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use for announcements, CTAs, episode labels, or short updates that should read like a news ticker or promo strip.

props.name: label
props.description: Small uppercase kicker above the main text (for example “Update” or “New”).

props.name: position
props.description: Edge to attach the strip: "top" or "bottom". Omit or use "bottom" for the default bottom placement.

enhancements.description: Quote-focused overlay with large decorative quotation styling and optional attribution.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use when highlighting a testimonial, memorable line, or cited speaker.

props.name: attribution
props.description: Who said it (name, role, or source line).
